headline: Macquarie Maintains Outperform on Las Vegas Sands, Lowers Price Target to $66
summary: Macquarie  analyst Chad Beynon   maintains Las Vegas Sands (NYSE:LVS) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $68 to $66.
